title: Kast hires former SEC official Stephanie Allen to lead policy communications
message_html: Kast hires former SEC official Stephanie Allen to lead policy communications ...
snippet: Stablecoin payments company Kast hired former SEC adviser Stephanie Allen as it expands licensing, communications and policy efforts after an $80 million raise.

title: US gov't sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts
message_html: US gov't sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts ...
snippet: The US CFTC has sued four states for trying to enforce state-level gambling laws on prediction markets, meanwhile Strategy stacked over 56,000 BTC.

title: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules
message_html: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules ...
snippet: The FCA signs off rules to let UK funds keep registers onchain and add a new Direct‑to‑Fund dealing model, aiming to simplify tokenized funds inside the existing regime.

title: THORWallet partners with Unblock to expand global non-custodial Mastercard access
message_html: THORWallet partners with Unblock to expand global non-custodial Mastercard access ...
snippet: THORWallet has partnered with Swiss-regulated provider Unblock to expand global access to non-custodial Mastercard solutions, advancing self-custodial finance adoption.

title: Solana ecosystem expands institutional push with Europe-focused research arm
message_html: Solana ecosystem expands institutional push with Europe-focused research arm ...
snippet: Solana is launching a Swiss-based research institute and practitioner guide to help European financial institutions evaluate its blockchain as regulatory clarity and onchain usage grow.

title: Shinhan Card Partners Solana Foundation to Pilot Stablecoin Payments
